title: dYdX - REKT
relevance_summary: Market manipulation leading to insurance fund depletion via liquidations on a lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that significantly increases open interest in a short period followed by liquidations

summary: A targeted attack involved market manipulation of YFI on dYdX, leading to significant insurance fund depletion. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions that show a sudden increase in open interest followed by large-scale liquidations.
